sync_function_definition.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_lead_to_customer_profile()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO public.erp_customer_profiles (name, phone, lead_id, address)
    VALUES (
        NEW.name,
        NEW.phone,
        NEW.id,
        NULLIF(BTRIM(NEW.location), '')
    )
    ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE
    SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        lead_id = COALESCE(public.erp_customer_profiles.lead_id, EXCLUDED.lead_id),
        address = CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(public.erp_customer_profiles.address), ''), '') = ''
                THEN EXCLUDED.address
            ELSE public.erp_customer_profiles.address
        END,
        updated_at = now();

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

leads_trigger_binding.trigger_def: CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_lead_customer AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON leads FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_lead_to_customer_profile()
